3302590.name: Shadow Chronicles: Nocturna
3302590.description:
In a world where the line between the real and the supernatural blurs, Shadow Chronicles: Nocturna plunges you into a dark and captivating journey.

As Donovan Blake, the 'Haunted Detective,' you will embark on a frantic search for answers regarding the disappearance of your wife. Set against a stylized backdrop that blends noir and fantasy elements, you will face the Lords of the Night, each representing a unique challenge that will test your skills and sanity.

Game Highlights

  • Unique Visual Style: Immerse yourself in a stunning visual universe that combines pixel art and low-poly 3D models, creating a nostalgic yet modern aesthetic. Each environment is meticulously designed to reflect the dark atmosphere of Nocturna.

  • Dynamic Gameplay: Battle hordes of enemies in a fluid combat system that combines melee attacks and supernatural abilities. Collect souls from defeated foes to unlock new combos and powers on the Skill Tree.

  • Alternative Game Modes: Challenge yourself in modes like Shadow Tower, where you will face endless waves of enemies, and Boss Rush, where every battle becomes a test of your skills.

Dive into Nocturna

Explore the arcs of a rich and engaging narrative, from the deep horrors of Azrael's Hell to the distorted world of Mephisto. Each act brings new challenges and stories, connecting past and present in a captivating way.

What to Expect

  • An engaging narrative exploring themes of love, loss, and redemption.

  • Intense and rewarding combat that combines strategy and skill.

  • A beautifully crafted world that has fallen into decadence.

  • A unique experience blending of beat 'em up and RPG elements.

Join the Hunt

Prepare for battle. Shadow Chronicles: Nocturna is currently in development and promises to be an unforgettable experience. Add the game to your wishlist and stay tuned for updates!
3302590.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
